constraints.description: Add WR cost to get total player cost
constraints.label: Total player cost
constraints.name: compute_total_player_cost

constraints.description: Total salary must cover all player costs
constraints.label: Salary covers player costs
constraints.name: salary_floor

constraints.description: Minimum QB quality threshold to remain competitive
constraints.label: Minimum QB quality
constraints.name: min_qb_quality

constraints.description: Win probability must reflect minimum roster competitiveness (at least 40%)
constraints.label: Minimum competitiveness
constraints.name: min_competitiveness

description: Draft the best possible fantasy sports roster by selecting player stats across positions while staying under the salary cap. Balance quarterback rating, running back yards, wide receiver catches, tight end touchdowns, and defensive sacks to maximize total fantasy points.
name: Fantasy Sports Draft

objectives.label: Maximize quarterback rating as primary draft metric
objectives.name: total_fantasy_points

soft_constraints.description: Having a marquee star player drives fan engagement and ticket sales
soft_constraints.label: Fan favorite
soft_constraints.name: prefer_star_player

variables.label: Total defensive sacks for the season
variables.name: def_sacks

variables.label: Whether the roster includes a marquee star player (0=no, 1=yes)
variables.name: has_star_player

variables.label: Running back rushing yards for the season
variables.name: rb_yards

variables.label: Tight end touchdowns for the season
variables.name: te_touchdowns

variables.label: Total player cost (qb + rb + wr costs, auxiliary)
variables.name: total_player_cost

variables.label: Total team salary expenditure in dollars
variables.name: total_salary

variables.label: Projected season win probability as percentage (0-100)
variables.name: win_probability

variables.label: Wide receiver receptions for the season
variables.name: wr_catches

additional_constraints.description: Star QB is injured; backup has a lower ceiling rating of 85
additional_constraints.label: QB injury cap
additional_constraints.name: qb_injury_cap

additional_constraints.description: Lead RB is injured; backup limited to 1200 rushing yards
additional_constraints.label: RB injury cap
additional_constraints.name: rb_injury_cap

what_if_scenarios.description: Simulate key player injuries that cap the quarterback rating at 85 and running back yards at 1200. Uses push/pop to temporarily add injury constraints and evaluate how the optimal roster changes under adversity.
what_if_scenarios.name: Injury Scenario
